hero.description: I build cross-platform applications that are performant, well-architected, and a pleasure to use. Passionate about clean code, design patterns, and leveraging the right tools for the job.

about.title: About Me
about.bio_1: I'm a software engineer focused on multiplatform development who believes good code is not just functional — it's clean, maintainable, and thoughtfully architected. I specialize in Kotlin Multiplatform, Java, and modern web frameworks.
about.bio_2: From building Android and iOS apps with KMP and Flutter to crafting polished web interfaces with Angular and Vue, I adapt to whatever stack delivers the best result. I'm driven by curiosity and a commitment to writing code that lasts.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities, interesting projects, and connecting with fellow developers.
